summary: Iteration 3 backend testing complete — multi-tenant Company model, per-company catalog & estimates isolation, misc-line roundtrip, CSV exports (dashboard + per-estimate), and now-configured Resend email status all verified. 21/21 pytest tests passed against the public preview URL. Real Resend send NOT exercised to preserve quota; instead verified endpoint exists, requires auth (401), and returns 404 for unknown estimate id.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py — Pydantic EmailQuoteIn.recipient_email is EmailStr, so an unauthenticated POST /api/estimates/{id}/email with a placeholder body still reaches the auth dependency first and correctly returns 401 (verified).

server.py — get_company_for raises 400 'User has no company' for users missing company_id; the startup migration assigns admin to its company and adopts orphan estimates, so this branch is only defensive (good).

server.py — /api/exports/estimates.csv & /api/exports/estimates/{id}.csv are correctly declared BEFORE the catch-all /estimates/{id} routes via api_router ordering; legacy /api/estimates/export.csv path verified removed (returns 405 method-not-allowed, expected).

server.py — invite_code generated from a 31-char alphabet × 8 chars (~38 bits entropy). Adequate for invite-only flow; uniqueness enforced by unique index. Consider regenerating on collision (currently relies on retry-from-client if create_company ever hits a dup, but in practice probability is ~negligible).
server.py — _create_company always seeds a fresh DEFAULT_SECTIONS catalog; per-company isolation verified by editing CompanyA catalog and confirming CompanyB still has default 92.19 Conquest price.
server.py — misc_labor & misc_material persist correctly through PUT then GET round-trip; both arrays included in CSV per-estimate export under their respective synthetic section labels.

server.py — Resend send wrapped with asyncio.to_thread (good — keeps event loop unblocked). Failures are logged with logger.exception and surfaced as 500. Not exercised live in tests to preserve quota.
server.py — Same iteration_2 carry-over: logout cookie clearing uses samesite/secure now (fixed), CORS still allows credentials with explicit origins from env. OK.
test_credentials: admin@wolfandson.com / Admin123! — works; role now 'owner' with a company_id as required.
seed_data_creation: Each test run creates ephemeral test companies (TEST_CompanyA_*, TEST_CompanyB_*, TEST_NewCo_*) and one TEST_MiscLines estimate; the estimate is deleted at the end of the run by TestCleanup. The throwaway test users and companies remain in MongoDB but are namespaced with TEST_ prefixes and random suffixes.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend at https://app-converter-170.preview.emergentagent.com is fully green for iteration 3. Use /app/backend/tests/test_estimator_api.py as a regression suite. Multi-tenant boundaries are enforced via {id, company_id} filters on every estimate operation. Resend is configured; do NOT call /api/estimates/{id}/email with a real recipient in subsequent runs (quota burn). To exercise email, mock resend.Emails.send or use a dedicated test address you own.
rca of the issue: No issues found — all iteration-3 features behave as specified.
